tldr: Harold Tejada took the hilly stage to Apt six seconds clear of a six-rider chase headed by Dorian Godon, Lewis Askey and Bryan Coquard. The GC stayed on Vingegaard's terms.

narrative.headline: Tejada solo to Apt
narrative.body: 179 km, four cat-2/3 climbs and a 5% kicker into Apt. Tejada bridged off the four-man early break and held to the line. Godon's chase group six seconds back.

gcImpact.headline: Vingegaard defending
gcImpact.body: GC unchanged; Vingegaard's margin from Stage 5 holds.
